description: baseline — trigger event opener, Woohoo Pets anchor, low-friction CTA
subject: Woohoo Pets' 65% support cost drop — what that signals about your next vertical
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Noticed {{company}} reclassified its business activity in December 2024 — from software development to retail. That kind of shift usually signals a deliberate go-to-market decision, not just a filing formality.

The Woohoo Pets result (65% support cost reduction) suggests you've cracked something real.

I'd like to send you a short competitive positioning note — no strings — on how the WhatsApp retention space in SEA is consolidating around 2–3 players. Useful or not useful, it's yours in 24 hours.

Worth it?

{{sender_name}}
{{sender_title}} | {{sender_company}}
notes: Opens with ACRA registry trigger event. Reflects their own published metric back at them. CTA is a free deliverable, not a meeting request. Closes with binary 'Worth it?' question.
